headline: Jim Cramer on Vistra: “I Know It’s Utility, Doesn’t Matter, It’s a Steal”
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed on Mad Money as he addressed investors’ recent overblown worries and growth stocks stuck in bear-market territory.
